traits.locale_text:
Using combat stimulators does not inflict negative effects.
The use of stimulants costs −1 AP less.
If the user chooses themselves as a target of the combat stimulator, they regain +{uip|Heal|d23c57136f0d4934b16102f110311f7c} wounds.
